summary: Code- en schemafundament zijn releasewaardig; productie-go blijft afhankelijk van live infrastructuur-, load-, recovery- en providerbewijs.

evidence: ownership enforcement and privileged backoffice checks
rate limiting for authentication and default API traffic
CSP, frame, content-type, referrer and permissions headers
staging security review artifact reports PASS
raw orchestration tool outputs are not persisted by default
execution is user-owned and explicitly confirmed
graph memory remains scoped by user ID
remaining: PII review of provider payloads and logs

evidence: provider retries and circuit behavior implemented
reusable native HTTP load-smoke script added
remaining: run against staging with production-sized PostgreSQL

evidence: 25 migrations replay successfully in embedded PostgreSQL
dead-letter retry and notification outbox are persistent

browserAcceptance.reason: System Chromium terminates because its GPU process is unusable in this sandbox; Playwright browser download is unavailable due DNS/network restrictions.

goLiveBlockers: successful full Playwright run in supported CI browser image
staging load test and agreed latency/error thresholds
